ground_truth.title: Hire 10 best Machine Learning Engineers/Developers in Dec 2025 (48Hours)
ground_truth.main_content: Hire Machine Learning Engineers in 48 Hours. Streamline your process to hire machine learning engineers with Uplers platform. Get AI-vetted top-tier engineers with zero hassle. Recently Added Machine Learning Engineers in our Network: Suchir Mathur - ML Engineer with 4.7 Years Experience, skilled in machine_learning, Computer Vision, Deep Learning. Rakesh Kumar Mallik - Sr. ML Engineer with 7 Years Experience, experienced in data-science, Computer Vision, Machine Learning. Abhay Kansal - Principal ML Engineer with 12.7 Years Experience, expert in Computer Vision, Data Architecture, Data Engineering. Pranit Abhinav - Machine Learning Engineer (Computer Vision) with 4 Years Experience, proficient in Python, NLP, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Flask, Computer Vision, ANN, AWS. Tarang Gupta - Machine Learning Engineer III with 7 Years Experience, skilled in data-science, Python, machine_learning, Data Visualization. Madhumitha Kolkar - ML Engineer with 4 Years Experience, specializing in Algorithms, Datastructures, Debugging, programming languages. Hire Machine Learning Engineers in 4 Easy Steps: 01 Define - Tell us what you need, we'll understand your requirements. 02 Discover - Meet the top talent, get 3-5 suitable candidates in 48 hours. 03 Evaluate - Interview with ease, choose the best candidate. 04 Onboard - Hire with confidence, we handle the onboarding process. Top Reasons to Choose Uplers: Hire in 48 Hours, Top 3.5% Talents, 40% Cost Advantage, Works in 5+ Time Zones, Employer on Record (EOR), Simple Contracts, 30 Days Cancellation, 2X Retention Rate. Various Skills that Machine Learning Engineers Possess: R, JavaScript, Kotlin, Golang, C++, SQL, MongoDB, Big Data Tools, Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Statistical Modeling, Algorithm Design, Artificial Intelligence, Natural Language Processing, Python Programming, Machine Learning Algorithms, Deep Learning Frameworks, Data Visualization, Data Preprocessing, Software Engineering, Cloud Platforms, Databases, Devops, Data Pipelines. Frequently Asked Questions: Uplers provides mid to senior-level ML engineers experienced in supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning, proficient in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn for predictive analytics, NLP, and computer vision. Engineers can support both product and consulting projects and work in multiple time zones. Profiles are shared within 48 hours, with flexible contract and full-time hiring options starting at $2,500/month. Lifetime replacement guarantee offered.
